source: Statistics Canada, Canada's population clock (real-time model)
_README: DISABLED (enabled:false) — the widget now runs on the official StatCan WDS REST API (daily quarterly-estimate pull + modelled rate), the no-scraping default. This file is an inert template: to re-pin to a live clock reading, set enabled:true with a numeric population and ISO-8601 capturedAt (optionally ratePerSecond), e.g. via `npm run pop-clock:rebase -- <population> [changeSinceMidnight]` or the "Rebase pop clock calibration" workflow. The figure is read off StatCan’s public clock by a human — never scraped. Snapshots older than 21 days, malformed, or future-dated are ignored automatically.
